Home

Chicken Scampi

author: Janet Caldwell

Prep time ->

Cook time ->

Yield:

Ingredients

-1-stick butter -1/4 cup of olive oil -1/4 cup green onions, chopped -1 tbsp. garlic, minced -2 lbs chicken breasts, boneless, cut into 1/2” pieces -Juice of one lemon -1 tsp. salt -1/2 tsp. black pepper -1/4 cup fresh parsley, minced -1 tomato, chopped -Cooked hot rice

Directions

  1. In skillet, heat together butter and olive oil and saute onions and garlic.
  2. Add chicken, lemon juice, salt, pepper and parsley.
  3. Continue cooking, stirring constantly, for 5-8 minutes or until chicken is done. Add tomatoes and heat through.
  4. Serve over hot rice.
